## Override Candidates

**AI_TECH SLEEVE — REVIEW WARRANTED, NO OVERRIDE RECOMMENDED**

- **Affected tickers:** SOXQ, CHAT, DTCR, GRID (momentum ranks #7, #6, #14, #4 respectively)
- **Contradiction:** Trump admin formalized 15-25% revenue-sharing fee on Nvidia chip exports to China; unprecedented margin compression risk. Systematic signal uses 3-12mo lookbacks; enforcement began in recent weeks, causing Nvidia share price decline.
- **Direction:** Systematic signal says ai_tech sleeve should be 22-32% of allocatable denom (near top of band given high momentum ranks). News suggests caution.
- **Recommendation:** **Do not override.** Rationale:
  1. ai_tech is diversified across 5 tickers; Nvidia exposure is indirect (SOXQ holds NVDA but also AVGO, TSM, others)
  2. Revenue fee applies to China exports only; policy debate ongoing, conditional exemptions possible
  3. Execution gate will defer buys if z-scores spike (vol protection already embedded)
  4. Momentum signal captures 6-12mo forward earnings expectations via price; if material, analysts will downgrade and momentum will decay naturally within 2-3 rebalance cycles
  5. Override would require manually setting ai_tech target below systematic allocation—violates policy unless hard constraint breached (none are)

**Action:** Acknowledge headline risk in recommendation. Monitor ai_tech sleeve momentum scores over next 2 rebalances (Apr, May). If momentum ranks for SOXQ/CHAT deteriorate below 0.40 percentile (bottom 40%), re-evaluate sleeve cap or propose ticker substitution.
